---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    minimal: true
---

<div style="position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; background: white; margin: 0; padding: 0;">
  <h1 style="font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 300; color: #2a2a2a; letter-spacing: 0.1em; font-family: 'Crimson Text', Georgia, serif;">
    Paciência
  </h1>
</div>
